'''Evet Scy'rrep''' was a noted shipjacker who stole over fifteen large [[Starship/Legends|ships]] before getting caught, with riches of millions. When asked why he only hijacked luxury liners, he merely replied: "''Because that's where the [[Galactic_Credit_Standard/Legends|credits]] are.''"

He was featured on ''[[Galactic Bandits]]'', a [["Holo"|holo]] enjoyed by young [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who idolized this figure.<ref name="The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
This character is a [[tuckerization]] of [[Steve Perry]], the author who created the character in his book, [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1stm|in book}}
